3325098848.title: 💕MORE FOR YOU💕Hospicare 40R Adult Body Wipes 40 Sheets (18 packs)
3325098848.detail_text: GENERAL DESCRIPTION : HospiCare 40R Adult Body Wipes are extra large and soft disposable wipes with pleasant and refreshing fragrance suitable for daily cleansing of the body to help you stay cool, clean, comfortable and refreshed. It comes in a resealable pack for convenience and ease of use anytime, anywhere. ACTIVE INGREDIENT : Deionized Water, Phenoxyethanol, Polysorbate 20, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice, Fragrance, Sodium Gluconate, Chlorphenesin, Chlorhexidine digluconate, Glycerin, Ethylhexylglycerin, Citric acid PRODUCT PERFORMANCE : HospiCare 40R Adult Body Wipes are made of strong, thick and soft paper that is gentle to the skin. It contains Aloe Vera leaf juice that helps condition and moisturizes the skin. The use of this towel can eliminate the use of harsh soaps, rough washcloths and towel drying. It is regulated to pH 5.5 which is similar to the pH balance of the skin, hypoallergenic and alcohol–free making it suitable for all skin types. APPLICATION PROPERTIES : • for dry bathing in the hospital and home use • for spa and massage purposes • adult nursing • for daily body cleaning METHOD OF APPLICATION : Gently wipe towel on the areas of the body that needs cleaning. USABLE LIFE AND STORAGE : This product has a usable life of 24 months from the date of production. Store in a cool, dry place not over 30 degrees.

3495560537.title: Tena PROskin Adult Wipes 40 Sheets x 12 packs
3495560537.detail_text: TENA Wet Wipes are pre-moistened, adult-sized wet wipes that cleanse, protect and moisturize even the most fragile skin. For everyday use, these large wet wipes are ideal for cleansing intimate areas when changing incontinence products or for full-body cleansing. Being a gentle alternative to soap and water, TENA Wet Wipes helps to keep the skin feeling fresh, clean and free of odour. Features: 1. Designed for adults: XL size, 30 x 20 cm, is approximately two times bigger than an average baby wipe. 2. Convenient care: Easy one-handed dispensing; no rinsing or drying is required. 3. Gentle for fragile skin: Soft and thick wipes provide gentle touch. Dear Customer, - Do take note that your parcel may arrive in 2 or more different parcels due to size limit by logistic partner. - Kindly wait 3 to 5 working days if you only received only partial items. - Please do not hesitate to reach out to us via chat if you have any question regarding your orders. Thank you.

For everyday use, these large wet wipes are ideal for cleansing intimate areas when changing incontinence products or for full-body cleansing. Being a gentle alternative to soap and water, TENA Wet Wipes helps to keep the skin feeling fresh, clean and free of odour. Features: 1. Designed for adults: XL size, 30 x 20 cm, is approximately two times bigger than an average baby wipe. 2. Convenient care: Easy one-handed dispensing, no rinsing or drying is required. 3. Gentle for fragile skin: Soft and thick wipes provide gentle touch. Dear Customer, Do take note that your parcel may arrive in 2 or more different parcels due to size limit by logistic partner. 2453510819.detail_text: GENERAL DESCRIPTION : HospiCare 40R Adult Body Wipes are extra large and soft disposable wipes with pleasant and refreshing fragrance suitable for daily cleansing of the body to help you stay cool, clean, comfortable and refreshed. It comes in a resealable pack for convenience and ease of use anytime, anywhere. ACTIVE INGREDIENT : Deionized Water, Phenoxyethanol, Polysorbate 20, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice, Fragrance, Sodium Gluconate, Chlorphenesin, Chlorhexidine digluconate, Glycerin, Ethylhexylglycerin, Citric acid PRODUCT PERFORMANCE : HospiCare 40R Adult Body Wipes are made of strong, thick and soft paper that is gentle to the skin. It is regulated to pH 5.5 which is similar to the pH balance of the skin, hypoallergenic and alcohol–free making it suitable for all skin types. APPLICATION PROPERTIES : • for dry bathing in the hospital and home use • for spa and massage purposes • adult nursing • for daily body cleaning METHOD OF APPLICATION : Gently wipe towel on the areas of the body that needs cleaning. 13703962002.title: Bello Baby Fragrance-Free Diaper Wipes 80s - Dermatologically Tested, Vitamin-Enriched, 99.9% Pure Water, Resealable Pack
13703962002.detail_text: 99.9% Pure Water Baby Wipes, the simplest formula for an effective yet soft and gentle clean for newborn babies. Our advanced 6-stage water purification system comprising of USA-made dual membrane (mirco-filtration and reverse osmosis) and ultraviolet technologies ensures all water used in our products attained the HIGHEST PURITY. Infused with moisturizing Aloe Vera Extracts and the goodness of Vitamin E to prevent post-cleansing dryness. GSM, grams per square : 40 Sheet size : 200mm X 150 mm Aloe Vera extracts & Vitamin E extracts Dermatologically Tested pH balanced & gentle on skin Fragrance-free NO Alcohol, Paraben, MIT/ CIT Ingredients: Aqua, Tocopheryl Acetate (Vitamin E). Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Extract (Aloe Vera). Quaternium-8, Citric Acid, Ascorbic Acid, Glycopids, Glycerin. Bioflavonoids. Cetylpyridinium Chloride. Caution: Close the lid completely to prevent baby wipes from drying. Store in a cool, dry place. Avoid direct sunlight. Dispose the used wipes into a waste bin, do not flush. If irritation occurs, stop use and consult your physician if necessary

brand.suggestion: More Diapering & Potty from BELLO

product.desc:
99.9% Pure Water Baby Wipes, the simplest formula for an effective yet soft and gentle clean for newborn babies. Our advanced 6-stage water purification system comprising of USA-made dual membrane (mirco-filtration and reverse osmosis) and ultraviolet technologies ensures all water used in our products attained the HIGHEST PURITY.

Infused with moisturizing Aloe Vera Extracts and the goodness of Vitamin E to prevent post-cleansing dryness.

GSM, grams per square : 40

Sheet size : 200mm X 150 mm

Aloe Vera extracts & Vitamin E extracts

Dermatologically Tested

pH balanced & gentle on skin

Fragrance-free

NO Alcohol, Paraben, MIT/ CIT

Ingredients:

Aqua, Tocopheryl Acetate (Vitamin E). Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Extract (Aloe Vera). Quaternium-8, Citric Acid, Ascorbic Acid, Glycopids, Glycerin. Bioflavonoids. Cetylpyridinium Chloride.

Caution:

Close the lid completely to prevent baby wipes from drying.

Store in a cool, dry place. Avoid direct sunlight.

Dispose the used wipes into a waste bin, do not flush.

If irritation occurs, stop use and consult your physician if necessary

2812088753.title: ABSORBA Nateen Adult Wipes With Aloe Vera (Single Lid) 40s (Expiry: Oct`2026)
2812088753.detail_text: ABSORBA Nateen Adult Wipes With Aloe Vera (Single Lid) 40s Nateen Wet Wipes Were Created With Incontinence In Mind, Overall Body, And Cosmetic Wipes. For Sensitive Skin, These Extra Large Non Woven, Disposable Hypoallergenic Wipes, Are Alcohol And Chlorine Free. It Contains Natural Aloe Vera Which Act As An Antiseptic Agent Against Infections, Dry Skin And Inflammation. Product Usage: To Use Adult Wet Wipes, Follow These Steps: 1) Open The Package Of Wet Wipes And Remove A Single Wipe. 2) Gently Unfold The Wipe And Smooth It Out On A Clean, Flat Surface. 3) Using The Wipe, Clean The Area That You Want To Clean. This Can Be Your Hands, Face, Or Any Other Body Part That You Want To Clean. 4) When You Are Finished Using The Wipe, Dispose Of It In A Trash Can. Do Not Flush The Wipe Down The Toilet, As This Can Cause Plumbing Problems. 5) Repeat These Steps As Needed To Clean Additional Areas Or To Replace The Wipe If It Becomes Soiled. It Is Important To Use Wet Wipes According To The Instructions On The Package. Some Wipes Are Only Intended For External Use, While Others Can Be Used On More Sensitive Areas Of The Body. Always Read The Label Carefully And Follow The Instructions To Avoid Irritation Or Other Problems. Product Warnings: Store In Dry And Cool Place, Away From Direct Sunlight.
2812088753.detail_html:
ABSORBA Nateen Adult Wipes With Aloe Vera (Single Lid) 40s

Nateen Wet Wipes Were Created With Incontinence In Mind, Overall Body, And Cosmetic Wipes. For Sensitive Skin, These Extra Large Non Woven, Disposable Hypoallergenic Wipes, Are Alcohol And Chlorine Free. It Contains Natural Aloe Vera Which Act As An Antiseptic Agent Against Infections, Dry Skin And Inflammation.

Product Usage:

To Use Adult Wet Wipes, Follow These Steps:

1) Open The Package Of Wet Wipes And Remove A Single Wipe.

2) Gently Unfold The Wipe And Smooth It Out On A Clean, Flat Surface.

3) Using The Wipe, Clean The Area That You Want To Clean. This Can Be Your Hands, Face, Or Any Other Body Part That You Want To Clean.

4) When You Are Finished Using The Wipe, Dispose Of It In A Trash Can. Do Not Flush The Wipe Down The Toilet, As This Can Cause Plumbing Problems.

5) Repeat These Steps As Needed To Clean Additional Areas Or To Replace The Wipe If It Becomes Soiled.

It Is Important To Use Wet Wipes According To The Instructions On The Package. Some Wipes Are Only Intended For External Use, While Others Can Be Used On More Sensitive Areas Of The Body. Always Read The Label Carefully And Follow The Instructions To Avoid Irritation Or Other Problems.

Product Warnings:

Store In Dry And Cool Place, Away From Direct Sunlight.

3502511803.title: LPD - Aloe Vera Wipes/Crf
3502511803.detail_text: BRAND : CARREFOUR Product Description : Treat your baby's delicate skin with the utmost care with Carrefour's Baby Wipes infused with Fresh Aloe Vera. These premium baby wipes are not only gentle on your baby's skin but are also nourishing, thanks to their unique blend of ingredients, including Aqua, peg-40 hydrogenated castor oil, glycerin, propylene glycol, and prunus amygdalus dulcis oil. The soothing properties of aloe barbadensis leaf extract help to keep your baby's skin soft and moisturized, while naturally derived sodium levulinate and caprylyl glycol act as preservatives. Ingredient : Aqua, Peg-40 Hydrogenated Castor Oil, Glycerin, Propylene Glycol, Sodium Levulinate, Caprylyl Glycol, Potassium Sorbate (202), Prunus Amygdalus Dulcis Oil, Citric Acid (330), Peg-5 Ethylhexanoate, Disodium Edta, Parfum, Trideceth-9, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Extract, Sodium Benzoate (211), Sodium Sulfite (221). Allergens : Sulfite. Allergens : Sulphites Country of Origin : FRANCE How to Use : Simply unfold a wipe and gently clean your baby's skin during a diaper change, or whenever needed. Make sure to reseal the package after use to keep the wipes moist and fresh. These wipes are suitable for use all over the body, not just for diaper changes, making them an essential addition to your baby's toiletries. Suggested Recipes / Uses : While Carrefour's Fresh Aloe Vera Baby Wipes are perfect for diaper changes, they can also be used in a variety of other ways. Use them for quick clean-ups after meals, especially when on-the-go. They can also serve as a gentle cleanser for your baby's face and hands. Try using these wipes for refreshing your baby on hot days or during travels. #Carrefour Baby Wipes#Fresh Aloe Vera Baby Wipes#Gentle Baby Cleansing Wipes#Nourishing Baby Wipes#Baby Toiletries#Baby Skin Care#Diaper Change Essentials#Baby Hygiene Products.
3502511803.detail_html:
BRAND : CARREFOUR

Product Description :
Treat your baby's delicate skin with the utmost care with Carrefour's Baby Wipes infused with Fresh Aloe Vera. These premium baby wipes are not only gentle on your baby's skin but are also nourishing, thanks to their unique blend of ingredients, including Aqua, peg-40 hydrogenated castor oil, glycerin, propylene glycol, and prunus amygdalus dulcis oil. The soothing properties of aloe barbadensis leaf extract help to keep your baby's skin soft and moisturized, while naturally derived sodium levulinate and caprylyl glycol act as preservatives.

Ingredient :
Aqua, Peg-40 Hydrogenated Castor Oil, Glycerin, Propylene Glycol, Sodium Levulinate, Caprylyl Glycol, Potassium Sorbate (202), Prunus Amygdalus Dulcis Oil, Citric Acid (330), Peg-5 Ethylhexanoate, Disodium Edta, Parfum, Trideceth-9, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Extract, Sodium Benzoate (211), Sodium Sulfite (221). Allergens : Sulfite.

Allergens :
Sulphites

Country of Origin : FRANCE

How to Use :
Simply unfold a wipe and gently clean your baby's skin during a diaper change, or whenever needed. Make sure to reseal the package after use to keep the wipes moist and fresh. These wipes are suitable for use all over the body, not just for diaper changes, making them an essential addition to your baby's toiletries.

Suggested Recipes / Uses :
While Carrefour's Fresh Aloe Vera Baby Wipes are perfect for diaper changes, they can also be used in a variety of other ways. Use them for quick clean-ups after meals, especially when on-the-go. They can also serve as a gentle cleanser for your baby's face and hands. Try using these wipes for refreshing your baby on hot days or during travels.



#Carrefour Baby Wipes#Fresh Aloe Vera Baby Wipes#Gentle Baby Cleansing Wipes#Nourishing Baby Wipes#Baby Toiletries#Baby Skin Care#Diaper Change Essentials#Baby Hygiene Products.

The soothing properties of aloe barbadensis leaf extract help to keep your baby's skin soft and moisturized, while naturally derived sodium levulinate and caprylyl glycol act as preservatives.

Ingredient :
Aqua, Peg-40 Hydrogenated Castor Oil, Glycerin, Propylene Glycol, Sodium Levulinate, Caprylyl Glycol, Potassium Sorbate (202), Prunus Amygdalus Dulcis Oil, Citric Acid (330), Peg-5 Ethylhexanoate, Disodium Edta, Parfum, Trideceth-9, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Extract, Sodium Benzoate (211), Sodium Sulfite (221). Allergens : Sulfite.

Allergens :
Sulphites

Country of Origin : FRANCE

How to Use :
Simply unfold a wipe and gently clean your baby's skin during a diaper change, or whenever needed. Make sure to reseal the package after use to keep the wipes moist and fresh. These wipes are suitable for use all over the body, not just for diaper changes, making them an essential addition to your baby's toiletries.

Suggested Recipes / Uses :
While Carrefour's Fresh Aloe Vera Baby Wipes are perfect for diaper changes, they can also be used in a variety of other ways. Use them for quick clean-ups after meals, especially when on-the-go. They can also serve as a gentle cleanser for your baby's face and hands. Try using these wipes for refreshing your baby on hot days or during travels.

1729527197.title: Raf Raf 2-in-1 Eco-Bamboo Flushable Diaper Liner Wipes
1729527197.detail_text: Specifications BrandRaf RafSKU1729527197_SGAMZ-8555976828Outer MaterialBamboo Description Not just another diaper liner! Our Eco-Bamboo Disposable Liners are made from Bamboo fibers, and make clean-up easy! No more dunking diapers in the toilet to rinse. To use, simply place one liner directly on top of your diaper. When changing, remove the liner and toss the solids into the toilet or trash to dispose. They are ultra soft and offer a perfect fit for most cloth diapers with no folding or tucking necessary. Made from renewable Bamboo, our liners are: 1. Biodegradable 2. non-toxic 3. Fragrand Free 4. Dye Free 5. Chloring free 6. Flushable 7. Breathable 8. 100 tear off sheets Why we love them: They reduce diaper staining and won't stick to baby's skin! Bamboo is one of the most renewable resource on earth and is grown without chemicals and pesticides. Bamboo is softer than cotton, cashmere, and silk! Bamboo has anti-microbial and anti-fungal properties and is non-irritating to the skin. Additionaly it can double as a wet wipe once we with running watter. Regular wet wipes on its own, have a certain amount of chemicals on them. Which is why they are able to stay wet for an extended time. Some babies with sensitive skin might get rashes through prolonged use of these chemical wet wipes. Using our bamboo liners as wet wipes can be a proven chemical-free option for you. If you want to report an issue with this item Click Here

It comes in a resealable pack for convenience and ease of use anytime, anywhere. For dry bathing in the hospital and home use For spa and massage purposes For pregnancy and confinement use For daily body cleaning Directions: 1) Gently wipe towel on the areas of the body that needs cleaning. 2) Discard used wipes in a waste bin. Ingredients: Purified Water, Phenoxyethanol, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice, Sodium Gluconate, Chlorphenesin, Polysorbate 20, Chlorhexidine digluconate, Fragrance, Glycerin

13639110276.title: HUAROU | Hand Mouth Diaper Specific Baby Wet Wipes
13639110276.detail_text: Large Size The large size of these wet wipes ensures they can cover more area, making them efficient and effective for cleaning. Pure Water Formula Made with pure water, these wet wipes are gentle on your baby's skin, reducing the risk of irritation or breakouts. Enhanced Thickness The increased thickness of these wet wipes provides better cleaning power, ensuring a thorough clean for your little one. Home Use Convenience These wet wipes are ideal for home use, offering a convenient and hygienic way to keep your baby clean and fresh throughout the day. Baby-Specific Use Designed specifically for newborns and toddlers, these wet wipes are perfect for cleaning delicate skin around the mouth, nose, and bottom.

2453468865.title: (CARTON DEAL) HospiCare 40R Adult Body Wipes 40 Sheets (18 packs)
2453468865.detail_text: GENERAL DESCRIPTION : HospiCare 40R Adult Body Wipes are extra large and soft disposable wipes with pleasant and refreshing fragrance suitable for daily cleansing of the body to help you stay cool, clean, comfortable and refreshed. It comes in a resealable pack for convenience and ease of use anytime, anywhere. ACTIVE INGREDIENT : Deionized Water, Phenoxyethanol, Polysorbate 20, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice, Fragrance, Sodium Gluconate, Chlorphenesin, Chlorhexidine digluconate, Glycerin, Ethylhexylglycerin, Citric acid PRODUCT PERFORMANCE : HospiCare 40R Adult Body Wipes are made of strong, thick and soft paper that is gentle to the skin. It contains Aloe Vera leaf juice that helps condition and moisturizes the skin. The use of this towel can eliminate the use of harsh soaps, rough washcloths and towel drying. It is regulated to pH 5.5 which is similar to the pH balance of the skin, hypoallergenic and alcohol–free making it suitable for all skin types. APPLICATION PROPERTIES : • for dry bathing in the hospital and home use • for spa and massage purposes • adult nursing • for daily body cleaning METHOD OF APPLICATION : Gently wipe towel on the areas of the body that needs cleaning. USABLE LIFE AND STORAGE : This product has a usable life of 24 months from the date of production. Store in a cool, dry place not over 30 degrees.

Deionized Water, Phenoxyethanol, Polysorbate 20, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice, Fragrance, Sodium Gluconate, Chlorphenesin, Chlorhexidine digluconate, Glycerin, Ethylhexylglycerin, Citric acid

• for dry bathing in the hospital and home use

• adult nursing

• for daily body cleaning

METHOD OF APPLICATION :

Gently wipe towel on the areas of the body that needs cleaning.

USABLE LIFE AND STORAGE :

This product has a usable life of 24 months from the date of production. Store in a cool, dry place not over 30 degrees.

2349768279.detail_text: 🧴ABSORBA Adult Wet Wipes 40s – Extra Thick, Gentle & Hygienic Cleansing for Adults Dermatologically Tested | Alcohol-Free | Enriched with Aloe Vera 🌿Gentle Yet Effective Cleansing for Delicate Skin Specially designed for adult care and hygiene, ABSORBA Adult Wet Wipes provide a quick, refreshing, and gentle clean — ideal for daily use, during diaper changes, or when water is not readily available. Each wipe is extra-thick, soft, and ultra-moist, ensuring effective cleansing without tearing easily. Perfect for elderly care, hospital use, or travel hygiene. ✨Key Features & Benefits: ✅ Extra Thick & Soft Fabric – Durable, premium-quality wipes that feel gentle on skin. ✅ Aloe Vera & Vitamin E – Helps soothe, protect, and moisturize sensitive skin. ✅ pH-Balanced & Alcohol-Free – Safe for daily use, preventing skin irritation. ✅ Hypoallergenic & Dermatologically Tested – Suitable for all skin types, even sensitive skin. ✅ Large Wipe Size (20cm x 30cm) – Covers more area per wipe for easier cleaning. ✅ Easy Pull-Open Lid – Keeps wipes fresh and moist until the last sheet. 🧼 Ideal For: Adult incontinence care and diaper changes Hospital, nursing home, or home caregiving Post-surgery cleansing Travel or on-the-go hygiene 📦 Available Options: [Single Pack] ABSORBA Adult Wet Wipes 40s [Bundle of 3 Packs] for greater savings [Carton Pack] for institutions or long-term care use 💚 Why Choose ABSORBA? Trusted by caregivers and healthcare professionals, Absorba provides complete hygiene and incontinence care solutions — from adult diapers and pull-up pants to underpads and wet wipes, ensuring total comfort and confidence every day.
2349768279.detail_html:
🧴ABSORBA Adult Wet Wipes 40s – Extra Thick, Gentle & Hygienic Cleansing for Adults

Dermatologically Tested | Alcohol-Free | Enriched with Aloe Vera

🌿Gentle Yet Effective Cleansing for Delicate Skin

Specially designed for adult care and hygiene, ABSORBA Adult Wet Wipes provide a quick, refreshing, and gentle clean — ideal for daily use, during diaper changes, or when water is not readily available.

Each wipe is extra-thick, soft, and ultra-moist, ensuring effective cleansing without tearing easily. Perfect for elderly care, hospital use, or travel hygiene.

✨Key Features & Benefits:

✅ Extra Thick & Soft Fabric – Durable, premium-quality wipes that feel gentle on skin.

✅ Aloe Vera & Vitamin E – Helps soothe, protect, and moisturize sensitive skin.

✅ pH-Balanced & Alcohol-Free – Safe for daily use, preventing skin irritation.

✅ Hypoallergenic & Dermatologically Tested – Suitable for all skin types, even sensitive skin.

✅ Large Wipe Size (20cm x 30cm) – Covers more area per wipe for easier cleaning.

✅ Easy Pull-Open Lid – Keeps wipes fresh and moist until the last sheet.

🧼 Ideal For:

  • Adult incontinence care and diaper changes
  • Hospital, nursing home, or home caregiving
  • Post-surgery cleansing
  • Travel or on-the-go hygiene

📦 Available Options:

  • [Single Pack] ABSORBA Adult Wet Wipes 40s
  • [Bundle of 3 Packs] for greater savings
  • [Carton Pack] for institutions or long-term care use

💚 Why Choose ABSORBA?

Trusted by caregivers and healthcare professionals, Absorba provides complete hygiene and incontinence care solutions — from adult diapers and pull-up pants to underpads and wet wipes, ensuring total comfort and confidence every day.

review_count.reviewContent: Gentle on baby's skin, 99% water-based wipes, does not tear.

3474161242.detail_text: About Product Wipe away worries with our 99-percent water-based fragrance-free baby wipes. Made with natural plant-based Oat Kernel Extract and Provitamin B5 to moisturize and gently cleanse baby's delicate skin. No Added Nasties - Free from MIT, Paraben, SLS, Soap, and Alcohol. Baby-friendly Fragrance with European Standards. 99-percent water content. Derma-tested, gentle on skin. Suitable for new-born baby.

brand.name: Botare
brand.suggestion: More Diapering & Potty from Botare

product.desc:
Large Quantity Pack



The large pack size offers great value for money, providing ample supply for daily use.






Baby-Specific Use



These wet wipes are specifically designed for babies, ensuring gentle cleaning and care for delicate skin.






Affordable Price



At an affordable price, these wet wipes offer a cost-effective solution for maintaining hygiene.






Versatile Use



Ideal for cleaning hands, mouth, and bottom, these wipes are versatile and essential for every family.






Convenient Packaging



The convenient packaging makes it easy to carry and use on the go, ensuring cleanliness wherever you are.

3349445351.title: Huggies Baby Wet Wipes Clean Care 80s Bundle Set of 6/12 packs
3349445351.detail_text: Kimberly Clark Huggies Clean Care Baby Wipes 80 sheets Bundle [Value Bundle Pack] Key Information • Made from natural fibres and it is soap, alcohol or fragrance-free • Huggies Gentle Care baby wipes are thick, soft, absorbent and large enough to cover your hand. • Enriched with aloe vera and vitamin E • Specially designed to soothe and keep every wipe moist • Gentlest care for the baby's delicate skin and clinically proven to prevent diaper rash • Dermatologically tested and pH balanced, and clinically safe for sensitive and newborn skin. • Design to clean your baby in just one or two wipes, which means less chance of causing irritation and fewer wipes used. • Enriched with aloe vera and vitamin E to naturally condition and care for your baby's skin. Storage • Keep seal tightly closed • Store at room temperature Highlights Mums, meet your new best friend. Wipes are indispensable for cleaning - and cleaning up after - your baby. For a wipe that's gentle enough to use on your baby's sensitive skin but tough enough to deal with the biggest messes, look no further than Huggies Gentle Care baby wipes. About the Brand Let's face it, cleaning up after your baby isn't one of parenting's nicer moments. That's why we've made it our mission to make change time quicker, easier and cleaner for your baby and you. Huggies has been looking after babies for years and we've learned new things from each generation that's been in our care. It's helped us fine-tune our diapers to meet what parents want and what babies need. What hasn't changed over the years is that parents need all the help they can get to raise happy, healthy babies. The best way we can help is to make sure our products do their job - and do it well. *Packaging may vary slightly from images provided* #huggies #easy clean #onewipeoneclean #nourishingcare #pureclean
3349445351.detail_html:
Kimberly Clark Huggies Clean Care Baby Wipes 80 sheets Bundle [Value Bundle Pack]

Key Information

• Made from natural fibres and it is soap, alcohol or fragrance-free

• Huggies Gentle Care baby wipes are thick, soft, absorbent and large enough to cover your hand.

• Enriched with aloe vera and vitamin E

• Specially designed to soothe and keep every wipe moist

• Gentlest care for the baby's delicate skin and clinically proven to prevent diaper rash

• Dermatologically tested and pH balanced, and clinically safe for sensitive and newborn skin.

• Design to clean your baby in just one or two wipes, which means less chance of causing irritation and fewer wipes used.

• Enriched with aloe vera and vitamin E to naturally condition and care for your baby's skin.

Storage

• Keep seal tightly closed

• Store at room temperature
